🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: May CPI surged to a 3-year high of 4.2%, but a cooler core reading gave Bitcoin room to bounce above $62K; simultaneously, U.S. and EU regulators each made their first moves to bring prediction markets and DeFi under formal rule frameworks. 📊 US CPI Hits 4.2% — A 3-Year High — But Bitcoin Bounces on Cooler Core Reading May's U.S. Consumer Price Index confirmed headline inflation at 4.2% year-over-year — the highest level since early 2023 — as energy costs inflated by the ongoing Iran conflict pushed prices higher. The market-moving detail, however, was the core reading: stripping out food and energy, monthly inflation came in at 0.2%, slightly below the 0.3% feared by traders. Read full story ⚖️ CFTC Issues First-Ever U.S. Rule Proposal for Prediction Markets The Commodity Futures Trading Commission proposed the first formal federal rulemaking for prediction market contracts, opening a public comment period on a framework that would assess whether individual contracts serve the "public interest." The move arrives the same week Kalshi — facing insider-trading scrutiny — rolled out employer-disclosure requirements for traders in high-risk markets. More details 🇪🇺 EU Opens Consultation to Expand MiCA to Cover DeFi, Crypto Perps & Prediction Markets The European Commission has launched a formal consultation on extending MiCA's regulatory perimeter to asset classes deliberately left out of the original framework — including decentralized finance protocols, tokenized perpetual derivatives, and prediction markets. The consultation signals the EU is entering MiCA's second, more ambitious phase, with sweeping potential implications for DeFi protocols, onchain derivatives venues, and prediction platforms operating under European jurisdiction. Read more 🏦 Japan's Three Largest Banks Plan a Joint Yen Stablecoin — Launch Target: March 2027 MUFG Bank, Mizuho Bank, and Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation have signed a memorandum of understanding to jointly issue a yen-denominated stablecoin targeting commercial launch during fiscal year 2026 — no later than March 2027. The trio collectively dominate Japan's corporate and retail banking sector. See details 💰 Fold Sells $45M in Bitcoin to Eliminate All Debt — Stock Surges 160% Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin fintech firm Fold disclosed it liquidated approximately $45 million i

74325.subject: Anthropic reclaims the AI crown with Mythos
74325.body:
The Atlas

Автор: GenAI Works


Автор: GenAI Works

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/anthropic-reclaims-ai-crown-mythos-genai-works-dt3pc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BLDYQpHbVSCejvxlvYsFXjw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=15p2htv5KvZsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq89or4x~1q-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq89or4x-1q
  
Welcome back! The model Anthropic said it would not release to the public just shipped, but the real story is bigger than one launch: AI is moving from answering questions to operating inside the systems we trust. Anthropic split one frontier model into public and restricted versions, Siri is becoming screen-aware and personal-context aware, NotebookLM is turning into a cloud workspace for research, and a healthcare study shows AI triage can change when one demographic word changes. Four stories, one signal: the next AI race is not only about capability, but about access, control, context, and trust. In today's Atlas Newsletter: Anthropic shipped the model it said it never would: one model splits into two, and the fallback trick behind the safe version. How Siri finally reads your screen: Apple rebuilds Siri around context, on the device and in the cloud. NotebookLM can write and run its own code: Google hands every notebook a cloud computer and eight export formats. Your AI doctor is gender profiling you: change one word in the symptoms and the urgency collapses. PS: Want to collaborate with the biggest GTM engine and distribution moat for AI companies? You can feature your tool with us and reach millions. Anthropic shipped the model it said it never would How does one AI model become two? The answer reveals one of the most interesting safety architectures we have seen in frontier AI so far. Anthropic has launched Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class model that is now available to the public. That is significant because Anthropic previously argued that models with this level of capability should not be broadly released until adequate safeguards existed to manage their risks. The challenge was straightforward. The same capabilities that help security teams find vulnerabilities can also help attackers exploit them. The same scientific reasoning that accelerates research can potentially be applied to dangerous biological or chemical problems. Anthropic's solution redirects risky requests rather than blocking them. When users ask questions in sensitive areas such as cybersecurity, biology, chemistry or model distillation, a separate layer of AI classifiers evaluates the request. If a risk threshold is triggered, the task is automatically handed off to Claude Opus 4.8 instead of Fable 5. The user still receives an answer, just from the less powerful model. According

74323.body:

 The Economist

Brooke Unger

Senior digital editor



Ahead of SpaceX’s gigantic initial public offering, you can see more rockets on Wall Street than at Cape Canaveral. It’s a sign of investment banks’ abasement before the likes of Elon Musk and the bosses of the AI companies who plan to follow him onto the market. Buttonwood,

our markets columnist , looks at the causes and consequences of this power shift in finance.

74322.subject: Is This The Best Bitcoin Accumulation Window?
74322.body:
Adrian's DeFi Insights 

Автор: Adrian Pape


Автор: Adrian Pape

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/best-bitcoin-accumulation-window-adrian-pape-xv9qe?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bx%2F3SUOXtRDWmc7TxRKrMEg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1MEV40k4diZsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq85t06e~se-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq85t06e-se
  
Yes it happened again... Bitcoin slipped under $60,000 on Friday, and the timeline split into two camps. One camp is shaken. Two straight weeks of ETF outflows, a Saylor sale, price grinding lower. They’re reading it ever bearish after switching bullish at $80k. The other camp is adding. I’m in that camp. We added to spot at $60k last week and we’ve now deployed 60% of our remaining stables to solid long term investments. Let me be honest about why, because this only works if you read it the same way I do. This is one of the best windows in a while to accumulate Bitcoin for the long term. Not a guarantee. A setup. If you think BTC makes new all-time highs from here, and you think the regulatory backdrop keeps improving with the Genius Act, then the risk-to-reward at these levels is hard to ignore. But that “if” is the whole game. If you don’t believe Bitcoin goes higher, you shouldn’t be buying it at any price. There’s no clever framing around that. The setup only matters once you’ve taken a side. So take a side. Then we can talk about what’s happening in the market this week. ️ ⚡ On today's Episode: 📈 Market Update – Bitcoin slips under $60k and the timeline splits in two. The case for why this is one of the best long-term accumulation windows in a while, the regulatory tailwind from the Genius Act, and the only two scenarios that matter: a 35% drop to $39k, or a 2x from here. 💸 Market Flows – Two straight weeks of billion-dollar ETF outflows (-$1.72B, -$1.42B), and why most of it is a basis trade unwinding, not capitulation. Saylor's Strategy buys 1,550 BTC and sells 32 to fund the STRC dividend (the bullish part). Plus the macro squeeze: SpaceX's $75B IPO is about to pull liquidity right when the market wants it. 🐂 Alpha Insights – Where I'm actually positioned: added spot at $60k, 60% of stables deployed, limit orders staged to $40k, Strategy build around $100. The two questions that decide whether this setup is yours, and the STRC level to watch The current state of the market. Saylor is buying his own losses Strategy bought another 1,550 BTC for $101 million between June 1 and June 7. That puts them at 845,256 BTC, more than 4% of the entire 21 million supply. At today’s price, that stack sits on roughly $10.5 billion in unrealized losses. The new buying came days after Strategy’s first sale since December 2022: 32 coins at an average o

74315.subject: Minebea, Výplatná páska/Payslip 05/2026
74315.body: Milí kolegovia, v prílohe tejto správy sa nachádza Vaša výplatná páska. Na otvorenie výplatnej pásky použite posledné 4 číslice vášho rodného čísla (za lomkou). Ak ste si heslo zmenili, použite nové heslo. _________________________________________________ Dear all, attached to this e-mail is your payslip. To open your payslip, use the last 4 digits of your birth number (after the slash). If you have changed your password, please use the new one. S pozdravom / Best regards, Personnel & Payroll department Minebea Slovakia s.r.o K letisku 1637, 040 17 Kosice
